final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: fine art editorial photo, suitable for book cover or art print
Primary request: a young woman in traditional Hanfu standing on a stone arch bridge in a Jiangnan water town, holding an oil-paper umbrella with blue-and-white porcelain patterns, umbrella partially covering her face, gentle and distant gaze
Scene/backdrop: Jiangnan ancient water town, stone arch bridge over a canal, black-awning boats (wupeng boats) passing slowly below, boatman wearing bamboo hat, white-walled black-tiled Hui-style architecture with climbing ivy on pink walls, wooden window frames with delicate bird-and-flower carvings
Subject: young woman in traditional Hanfu, delicate facial features partially obscured by umbrella, serene expression, flowing silk robes
Style/medium: fusion of Chinese gongbi (meticulous brushwork) and xieyi (freehand ink wash) painting aesthetics, photorealistic with painterly quality
Composition/framing: medium shot from eye-level, bridge as leading line, subject positioned slightly off-center, depth through layered background of boats and buildings
Lighting/mood: overcast diffused light, misty rainy atmosphere, soft and melancholic, ethereal and contemplative
Color palette: muted ink-wash tones, soft grays and blues, pale pink walls, dark roof tiles, subtle green ivy, desaturated overall
Materials/textures: smooth silk Hanfu fabric, wet stone bridge surface, aged wood textures, translucent umbrella paper, water reflections, mist droplets
Constraints: preserve the traditional Hanfu details, maintain the blue-and-white porcelain patterns on the umbrella, keep the misty Jiangnan atmosphere
Avoid: oversaturated colors, modern elements, bright sunlight, sharp shadows, anime style, western architectural elements
